title: Haworthia inconfluens
taxonomy: Haworthia inconfluens is classified as a species of succulent plant in the family Asphodelaceae. It is a member of the genus Haworthia, which comprises various species of small to medium-sized succulents native to southern Africa. Haworthia inconfluens is further categorized as a part of the subgenus Hexangularis, which includes species with hexagonal stem leaves. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics, such as its leaf shape and arrangement. Haworthia inconfluens is also often grouped within the Haworthia section Hexangularis, which is a subset of the subgenus Hexangularis.
